title: Giant Yellow Tree
description: Adds a giant Yellow Tree to the Birch and Savanna Biome.
body:
### Giant Yellow Tree

**This simple mod adds a giant Yellow Tree to the Birch and Savanna Biome.**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2afc802efe757af7699592479582c617aafd075.jpeg)


- The terrain around the tree is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
- perfect spot to build a base nearby
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
